final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration featuring Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from the IP 仙剑奇侠传, rendered in 3D animation Pixar style, each panel showing her peeking through a torn hole in white paper.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar style; each of the 9 panels framed as a character bust peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Composition: 3×3 grid layout, 9 equal panels — 3 rows × 3 columns; consistent framing across all panels with the torn-paper-hole motif
Subject: Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from 仙剑奇侠传 — young woman with long flowing dark hair, delicate fairy-like features, gentle and ethereal appearance consistent with her iconic IP design; expressions and actions per panel:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: each panel backdrop is white paper with a torn circular hole through which the character peeks; clean white negative space between panels
Lighting/mood: soft, warm, cheerful lighting consistent with Pixar 3D animation style; bright and playful mood across all 9 panels
Color palette: varied per panel outfit (green / red / yellow / black-white / orange / blue / purple / pink / teal); consistent skin tone and hair color across all panels
Materials/textures: 3D rendered smooth skin, fabric texture on outfits, torn paper edge texture on each panel frame
Text (verbatim): 赵灵儿
Constraints: all 9 panels must be visible and equally sized in the grid; character identity (赵灵儿 / 仙剑奇侠传 IP) must remain consistent across all panels; torn-paper-hole framing must appear in every panel
Avoid: inconsistent character appearance across panels, realistic photographic style, 2D flat illustration, missing panels
